rulings.Case Title: GARY E GROTE et al VS. DAVID DRIVER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 16, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANTS DAVID DRIVER, KRISHNA RALLAPALLI, PHILIPPINE RALLAPALLI, RALLAPALLI and EMELIA's AMENDED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED. Hearing Required to address the amount. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY E GROTE et al VS. DAVID DRIVER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Defendants To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs Gary Grote And Janice Grote Beyond The Distance Permitted By Code Of Civil Procedure 2025.250 And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 16, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANTS DAVID DRIVER, RALLAPALLI and EMELIA's Motion Of Defendants To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs Gary Grote And Janice Grote Beyond The Distance Permitted By Code Of Civil Procedure 2025.250 And Request For Sanctions Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer. Parties are to report of their progress at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE SCHOBER et al VS. KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 16, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI and JAHANGIR ARDEBILCHI's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the causes of action 1-3 as plaintiffs failed to exhaust administrative remedies under SF Admin. Code 41A. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 4th cause of action to clarify that this cause of action is not brought by Plaintiffs Gamache and McGee who concede that they are barred from bringing this claim be the release in the settlement agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2451 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC VS. ABEL JING LIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 16, 2015, line 16. DEFENDANT ABEL LIN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Notice and all supporting documents sufficiently apprise the tenants of their re-occupancy rights. Ellis Act does not require that landlord provide notice to tenants in one unit regarding extension of time for withdrawal of other units. = (501/REQ)
